app_category_descriptions.ai: AI apps for assistants, simulations, and creative thinking.
app_category_descriptions.all: Every routable Tuturuuu app available from this launcher.
app_category_descriptions.content: Content apps for publishing, files, and delivery.
app_category_descriptions.core: Core entrypoints for the Tuturuuu workspace platform.
app_category_descriptions.developer: Developer utilities, gateways, and technical tools.
app_category_descriptions.learning: Learning apps for courses, practice, and teaching.
app_category_descriptions.miscellaneous: Miscellaneous apps for docs, utilities, and public shortcuts.
app_category_descriptions.operations: Operations apps for money, inventory, and commerce.
app_category_descriptions.productivity: Productivity apps for schedule, tasks, messages, and meetings.

app_descriptions.apps: Browse and launch every app available in your workspace.
app_descriptions.calendar: Plan schedules, events, and shared availability.
app_descriptions.chat: Message teammates and keep workspace conversations together.
app_descriptions.cms: Create and publish structured content for sites and products.
app_descriptions.contacts: Organize customers, members, and relationship history.
app_descriptions.docs: Read product guides, references, and setup instructions.
app_descriptions.drive: Store, organize, and share workspace files.
app_descriptions.finance: Manage wallets, transactions, invoices, and budgets.
app_descriptions.hive: Explore collaborative simulations and spatial experiences.
app_descriptions.inventory: Manage products, stock, purchasing, and sales.
app_descriptions.learn: Follow courses, assignments, and learning progress.
app_descriptions.mail: Read and send workspace email from one inbox.
app_descriptions.meet: Schedule meetings and find a time that works for everyone.
app_descriptions.mind: Build mind maps and connect ideas with AI.
app_descriptions.nova: Create and solve prompt-driven AI challenges.
app_descriptions.pay: Manage billing, subscriptions, and payment activity.
app_descriptions.platform: Manage your workspace, settings, and the full Tuturuuu platform.
app_descriptions.rewise: Practice, review, and retain knowledge with AI.
app_descriptions.shortener: Create compact links and manage redirects.
app_descriptions.storefront: Sell products through a customer-facing online store.
app_descriptions.tasks: Plan projects, assign work, and track progress.
app_descriptions.teach: Plan courses, manage classes, and support learners.
app_descriptions.tools: Open focused utilities for QR codes and quick tasks.
app_descriptions.track: Record time and understand where work goes.

command_launcher.apps_description: Open another Tuturuuu app from this workspace.
command_launcher.empty_description: Try a workspace, app, page, or a closer spelling.
command_launcher.no_apps_found_description: Try a different app name or keyword.
command_launcher.search_hint: Type a workspace, app, page, acronym, or close spelling.
command_launcher.title: Command Launcher

common.create_workspace_description: Add a new workspace to easily manage everything that matters to you, and collaborate with your team as you go.
common.create_workspace_upgrade_notice: Workspaces are created with a free tier by default. You can upgrade your plan in the workspace billing page after creation.
common.join_workspace_by_slug_description: Enter the workspace name or link to open its join page.
common.report-problem-description: Help us improve by reporting issues you've encountered. Your feedback is valuable to us.
common.report-submitted-success: Report submitted successfully! Thank you for your feedback.
common.select-product-placeholder: Select the product with the issue
common.suggestion-placeholder: Describe the issue and any suggestions you have to improve the situation...
common.workspace_creation_failed: Failed to create workspace. Please try again.

mail.ai_compose_description: Create or revise content using mailbox instructions and the current conversation.
mail.ai_compose_instructions_placeholder: Describe what the message should accomplish, key facts, and preferred tone.
mail.ai_context_mailbox: Uses this mailbox’s drafting instructions. AI can only create content for your review.
mail.ai_context_thread: Uses the full conversation and mailbox instructions while treating email content as untrusted.
mail.ai_draft_review_notice: AI content is inserted as a draft only. Review every detail before sending.
mail.ai_label_suggestions_placeholder: Optional guidance, such as projects, customers, urgency, or workflows to separate.
mail.ai_quick_concise_prompt: Make this draft more concise while preserving every important fact and the current tone.
mail.ai_quick_follow_up_prompt: Write a concise, natural follow-up based on the conversation and suggest the clearest next step.
mail.ai_quick_polish_prompt: Polish this draft for clarity, flow, and professionalism without changing its meaning.
mail.ai_quick_warm_prompt: Rewrite this draft with a warmer, more personable tone while keeping it professional.
mail.auto_apply_label_description: Apply this label when an authorized smart-label workflow runs and the conversation matches.
mail.auto_draft_description: Create suggested reply drafts after eligible inbound messages.
mail.catch_all_auto_draft_description: Allow automatic AI drafts for unmatched recipients. This is separate from the normal mailbox policy.
mail.catch_all_description: Deliver unmatched addresses for this managed inbound domain to the selected mailbox.
mail.close_draft_description: Save this message as a draft, or discard it permanently.
mail.delete_draft_description: This permanently deletes the draft and its attachments.
mail.delivery_description: Managed domains, transports, and catch-all routing
mail.discard_draft_description: The saved draft and its attachments will be permanently removed.
mail.drafts_never_send: AI-created content always remains a draft until an authorized person sends it.
mail.empty_folder_description: Messages for this folder will appear here.
mail.identity_description: Sender name, signature, and mailbox defaults
mail.label_management_description: Create a mailbox taxonomy, configure smart classification, and control how labels are applied.
mail.labels_settings_description: Labels, manual tagging, and smart classification
mail.members_description: People and roles with mailbox access
mail.no_custom_labels_description: Create a label manually or ask AI to suggest a practical taxonomy.
mail.no_search_results_description: Try a different sender, subject, or keyword.
mail.not_available_description: Use an exact @tuturuuu.com account to access Tuturuuu Mail.
mail.not_available_title: Mail is not available for this account
mail.review_before_sending_description: A few details may need your attention. You are still in control of sending this message.
mail.save_offline: Offline — changes will save when reconnected
mail.search_help_description: Combine from:, to:, subject:, is:, has:attachment, before:, after:, and label: filters.
mail.select_message_description: Choose a message from the list to read it here.
mail.sender_name_managed: Personal mailboxes use the display name from your Tuturuuu profile. Update your profile to change this sender name everywhere.
mail.signature_description: Automatically added to new messages, replies, and forwards. You can edit it in each draft.
mail.signature_plain_text_placeholder: Your name, role, and contact details
mail.signature_preview_empty: Add a signature to preview it here.
mail.smart_label_description: Let mailbox-authorized AI suggest this label for matching conversations.
mail.smart_label_instructions_placeholder: Describe precisely when this label should and should not apply.
mail.subject: Subject
mail.title: Tuturuuu Mail
mail.warning_empty_message: The message has no content beyond the signature.
mail.warning_missing_attachment: The message mentions an attachment, but no file is attached.

nav-upgrade-dialog.contact_support: If you require immediate access to this feature, please contact our support team.
nav-upgrade-dialog.description: The {feature} feature requires a {tier} plan or higher.
nav-upgrade-dialog.rollout_notice: Please note that paid subscriptions are slowly rolling out and are currently unavailable. We appreciate your patience as we work to make this available to everyone.
nav-upgrade-dialog.title: {tier} Plan Required

satellite-workspace-settings.avatar_description: Used consistently across every Tuturuuu app.
satellite-workspace-settings.avatar_error: Could not update the workspace avatar.
satellite-workspace-settings.avatar_invalid: Choose an image smaller than 2 MB.
satellite-workspace-settings.billing_description: Manage plans, seats, and workspace billing.
satellite-workspace-settings.billing_manage_description: Open Tuturuuu Pay to manage the plan, member seats, invoices, and payment method.
satellite-workspace-settings.general_description: Manage workspace identity, handle, and avatar.
satellite-workspace-settings.load_error_description: Refresh and try again. Your app data is unaffected.
satellite-workspace-settings.members_description: Invite people, manage access, roles, and invite links.
satellite-workspace-settings.read_only_description: You can review these settings, but a workspace manager is required to change them.
satellite-workspace-settings.title: Workspace

preferences.keyboard_shortcuts_description: Review keyboard shortcuts for app and sidebar actions

version-badge.description: Build and deployment details for this app.
version-badge.setting_description: Show a compact build/version badge in the bottom-right corner of supported apps.
version-badge.title: Version details

workspace-invitation.description: Accept this invitation to join the workspace. App permissions will be checked after you join.
workspace-invitation.title: Join {workspace}

ws-members.guest_self_join_description: Allow signed-in users with matching workspace profile emails to join this workspace as guests.
ws-members.guest_self_join_label: Enable guest self-join by email match
ws-members.guest_self_join_update_error: Failed to update guest self-join setting.

create.description: Save reusable task defaults for repeated work.
create.title: Create task template

empty.description: Create a template for recurring tasks, checklists, and standard handoffs.
empty.title: No task templates

gallery.description: Create reusable task starters and keep board templates available in one place.

save_from_task.description: Enter a task ID to snapshot its current fields into a reusable template.
save_from_task.title: Save task as template

use.description_empty: Create a task from the selected template.
use.title: Use task template
